source.paper: BlenderGym: Benchmarking Foundational Model Systems for Graphics Editing (CVPR 2025)
source.paper_note: Section 3.1 states 245 scenes across five tasks: procedural geometry, lighting, procedural material, blend shape, and object placement with (50/40/40/75/40) instances respectively.
source.repo_note: These counts match the initial task_instance_count_dict in inference.py at commit f106e65.
